abilities.name: Excuse Me...
abilities.text: Once per turn. After a friendly Scheme marker within 8" is removed by an enemy model, this model may infuse one (soulstone).

abilities.name: I Believe That Legislation Forbids...
abilities.text: After an enemy model within 8" declares an attack action generated by a trigger or the Charge action, this model may drain a (soulstone) to cause that action to fail.

abilities.name: ...Such Activity Near Injured Workers
abilities.text: After an ally within 8" suffers 3 or more damage, it gains a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Foiled Plans
triggers.text: Target must remove an enemy Scheme marker from anywhere in play. If it cannot, it is dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Maneuver
triggers.text: Another ally within LoS may move up to 3".

actions.name: Obey
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation. This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Target declares an action, chosen and controlled by this model.

triggers.name: That Mine's Mine
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with terrain that is within 2" of the target.

triggers.name: Strip Defenses
triggers.text: This model may remove a token from the target.

actions.name: Walk the Line
actions.effects: Move the target up to 6" toward a marker in its LoS.
